name: Entity Velocity
desc: Sets an entity's velocity (e.g., from knockback, explosion, piston push).
notes: Velocities are encoded as (value * 8000). Real velocity = encoded / 8000.

implementation.overview: S12PacketEntityVelocity applies velocity to an entity. Fields: entityID (int), motionX/Y/Z (short). Each motion value is floor(v * 8000). After dividing by 8000, typical ranges are -3.9 to +3.9 blocks/tick. This is the PRIMARY anti-knockback packet — nearly every client has a Velocity/AntiKB module that cancels or scales it. The module checks if the entity ID matches the local player and then either cancels the packet (zero knockback) or scales each axis independently (e.g., horizontal 0%, vertical 100% = only vertical knockback).

modules.name: Velocity / AntiKnockback (Cancel)
modules.purpose: Completely negates knockback from hits and explosions.
modules.how_it_works: Check if s12.getEntityID() == mc.thePlayer.getEntityId(). If true, cancel the packet (event.setCancelled). The player takes no knockback.

modules.name: Velocity (Scale %)
modules.purpose: Reduce knockback by a configurable percentage instead of removing it entirely.
modules.how_it_works: Instead of cancelling, multiply each motion component by (percentage/100). Horizontal and vertical can be set independently.

modules.name: C0F Cancel Velocity
modules.purpose: Alternative anti-KB: cancel C0F when hurt instead of cancelling S12.
modules.how_it_works: When hurtTime > 0, cancel all C0FPacketConfirmTransaction packets. This prevents the server from confirming velocity transactions.

implementation.general_hooks: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleEntityVelocity(). The motion values are in units of 1/8000 of a block per tick (20 ticks/sec).
implementation.client_variations:
Tenacity 5.1: Cancel + Scale + C0F cancel modes.
Jigsaw 0.24: Knockback module replaces vanilla KB with custom values.
Sigma 3.9: AntiVelocity cancels or scales.
November 0.2: Multi-mode velocity handler.
Helium B41420: AntiKnockback cancels or scales.
